"""TUI data provider ABC for plan table display assembly."""
from abc import ABC, abstractmethod
from erk.tui.data.types import FetchTimings, PrFilters, PrRowData, RunRowData from erk.tui.sorting.types import BranchActivity
class PrDataProvider(ABC): """Abstract base class for TUI plan data assembly.
